text_body: Outcome: Expansion to two adjacent segments can add $42-58M ARR over 24 months with controlled CAC paybac
Growth in core segment is slowing from 22% to 11%, requiring mix diversification.
Win-rate analysis indicates Segment B has 1.8x conversion versus Segment C at current positioning.
Main constraint is onboarding capacity, not demand generation; implementation throughput is now the criti
Recommendation: prioritize Segment B first, then phase Segment C after onboarding redesign in Q3.
Risk: dilution of enterprise focus; mitigation: dedicated enterprise pod and pricing guardrails.
Decision required this quarter: approve phased expansion and enablement investment envelope.
text_footer_source: Internal CRM and pipeline analytics, Jan 2026

slots.text_q1: Strength: Net retention in enterprise accounts remains 118% with low logo churn.
slots.text_q2: Weakness: Time-to-value averages 61 days, 2.2x peer benchmarks.
slots.text_q3: Opportunity: Mid-market compliance segment growing 17% annually with low incumbent depth.
slots.text_q4: Threat: Competitors bundling implementation services at discounted rates.
slots.text_center_body: Strength: Net retention in enterprise accounts remains 118% with low logo churn.

text_left_body: Option A (Broad expansion): fastest top-line upside, highest execution risk, weaker focus.
Option B (Phased expansion): moderate upside, stronger conversion confidence, manageable capacity risk.
Option C (Core-only optimization): lowest risk, but limited growth headroom.
text_right_body: Criteria weighting: growth potential (35), execution risk (30), payback speed (20), strategic fit (15).
Recommendation: Option B because weighted score is highest under base and downside assumptions.

text_body: Month 0-2: finalize segment playbook and enable dedicated GTM pod.
Month 2-4: redesign onboarding workflow and reduce handoff latency by 30%.
Month 4-6: launch Segment B with weekly conversion and cycle-time governanc
Month 6-9: readiness gate for Segment C based on capacity and payback metri
Key risk: onboarding queue overload; mitigation: capacity trigger threshold
KPI set: ARR pipeline quality, conversion, CAC payback, onboarding cycle ti
